name: be-civic
description: Belgian administrative procedures assistant. Walks you through citizenship, residency, commune registration, mutualité enrolment, address change, residence card renewal, BIPL/inburgering integration parcours, apostille, EU multilingual forms, and dossier compilation. Verified library updates live via the becivic.be REST API.

monitors.name: be-civic-auto-commit
monitors.description: Auto-commits Be Civic substrate state (hidden + visible surfaces) as it changes
